headline: Uncover the latest developments among S&P500 stocks in today's session.
summary: Join us in exploring the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index in the middle of the day on Friday as we examine the latest happenings in today's session.

headline: KLA (KLAC) Up 10.1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?

headline: 5 Stocks With Real Revenue From Physical AI Today (Not 2030 Promises)
summary: Jensen Huang keeps quoting a $40 trillion humanoid robot TAM, and the market is rewarding every concept video and 2030 roadmap that mentions the word robot. I have been studying physical AI deployments for the better part of two years, and here is what I keep coming back to: the names that survive the inevitable ... 5 Stocks With Real Revenue From Physical AI Today (Not 2030 Promises)
